post.summary: Fetches the segments search list.
post.description:
This API retrieves the segments search list based on the provided request parameters. It allows filtering segments based on various criteria such as search fields, segment ids, provider, price range, and more.

**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| pageNo `[optional]` | Number | Page number for the required data. The default value is 1. 
| noOfEntries `[optional]` | Number | The maximum number of returned results per page. The default value is 100. |
| sortBy `[optional]` | String | Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(+) sign(ascii value '%2B') and for descending use minus(-) sign. 
| searchKeywordSet `[required if segmentIds not given]` | List of Number | Search keywords to be searched on the 'pathKey' and 'description' of the segments with encoded special characters. |
| segmentIds `[required if searchField not given]` | List of Number | List of segment ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| verticalIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of vertical ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| partnerIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of partner ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| providerIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of provider ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| priceRangeIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of price range ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| reachRangeIds `[optional]` | List of Number | List of reach range ids upon which segment data is to be filtered. |
| showOnlyReadySegments `[optional]` | Boolean | Flag to filter segments that are ready. Default is false. |
| showOnlyNonZeroSegments `[optional]` | Boolean | Flag to filter segments that have non-zero reach. Default is false. |

requestBody.description: Request body containing search criteria for segments.

Successful fetching of segments search l.description: Successful fetching of segments search list

post.summary: Create matched audience - unified endpoint for all verticals and subtypes
post.description:
Unified API endpoint for creating matched audiences across all verticals and subtypes.
     Supports Political, Specialization, and Healthcare (Patient, HCP, Nurse, Non NPI Nurse, Generic) verticals.
     The appropriate processing strategy is selected based on verticalId and subtypeId. audienceRequest
     and file is sent as binary multipart/form-data.

**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
    | audienceName `[required]` | String | Name of the matched audience to be created. Max length 255. |
    | dataPartnerId `[required for few verticals and few subtypes]` | Integer | ID of the data partner associated with the audience. |
    | audienceSubtypeId `[required for subtype specific audience]` | Integer | Subtype ID for Healthcare audiences (e.g., 3 for HCP, 4 for Nurse, 5 for Non NPI Nurse and 6 for Patient). |
    | columnMappings `[required]` | List of Objects | Mappings of file columns to expected data formats. Each object contains `columnId`, `fileColumnName`, and optional `dataFormatId`. |
    | fileRowCount `[required]` | Integer | Number of rows in the uploaded file. |
    | fileColumnCount `[required]` | Integer | Number of columns in the uploaded file. |
    | columnCombinationId `[required]` | Integer | ID representing the combination of columns used for matching. This represents the mandatory columns that should be provided for audience creation. |
    | consentGiven `[required for Healthcare Patient subtype]` | Boolean | Indicates if consent has been given for patient data usage. |

requestBody.description: Multipart form data with audienceRequest and XLSX/CSV file. Please see the structure of audienceRequest below:

schema.description: Multipart payload containing `audienceRequest` JSON and a binary `file` part.

post.summary: Add new Custom Voter Audience
post.description:
This endpoint will add a new Custom Voter Audience for the advertiser. The audience can be created for specific states or for PAN-USA (all states). The request body should contain the audience name, equation, reach, audience size, and optionally the state IDs for which the audience is to be created.
The equation should be a valid logical expression using the taxonomy IDs of the segments. The user can select different segments in a single group and fetch the data by providing logical relation between them using AND (&) and OR (|) operators. Different groups can be combined using AND (&) and OR (|) operators but in a single group, either only AND (&) operator or only OR (|) operator are allowed. Negation operator (!) can be used before a taxonomy ID to exclude that segment from the audience.

post.summary: Fetch segment details for Custom Voter Audience segment catalogue
post.description:
This endpoint will fetch the segments based on search parameters provided for Custom Voter Audience segment catalogue.
  • If no search parameters are provided then it will fetch all root segments for whole country (currently U.S.) along with their child segments.
  • If state Ids are provided then it will fetch all root segments for those states along with their child segments.
  • If parent segment Id is provided then it will fetch all child segments for that parent segment.
  • If search keywords are provided then it will fetch all leaf segments matching those keywords in column path_key and description.
  • If taxonomy Ids are provided then it will fetch all leaf segments matching those taxonomy Ids. If validateTaxonomyIds flag is true then it will validate all taxonomy Ids exist.
  • If segment Ids are provided then it will fetch those segments.
  • If none of the above criteria is met then it will return empty list.

post.summary: Validate Programmatic URLs for contextual audience targeting
post.description:
This API validates the given URL to be targeted in the contextual audience. It checks if
the URL is part of programmatic universe. if the any URL is mapped to 'true' that means the URL is valid,
if 'false' then that means that the URL is invalid, and if 'null' that means it's unable to validate the URL
(if URL is taking longer time to be validated, it sets NULL as the result for such URL).

#### Request Body Detail

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
|| pageNo `[optional]` | Number | Page number for the required data. The default value is 1. Setting the page number to -1 will disable pagination and return all data in a single page.|| noOfEntries `[optional]` | Number | The maximum number of returned results per page. Default value is 300.|| sortBy `[optional]` | String | Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(+) sign(ascii value '%2B') and for descending use minus(-) sign. Sorting is only allowed on the `campaignDate` field. The default sorting order is descending on the campaign start date field and can be expressed as `-campaignDate`.|| startDate `[optional]` | String | This represents a date filter. If a date is provided, the response data will be filtered to only include entries that have a date greater than the specified date. || endDate `[optional]` | String | This represents a date filter. If a date is provided, the response data will be filtered to only include entries that have a date less than the specified date. || ids `[optional]` | Array of String | Prioritizing selected dates over other dates in a response.|| isAllOwIds `[optional]` | Boolean | This represent filter records with all allowed owIds. if provided as `true`. `isAllOwIds` is more of a priority than `owIds`. || owIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | This represent customer owIds filter. If provided, response data will be filtered for those customer owIds only. |

post.summary: Save Campaign
post.description:
This API saves the campaign with given targeting and with `pending` status.

---

#### Request Body Detail

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| advertiserDomain | String | add domain |
| budgetDay | Number | Daily budget |
| budgetTotal | Number | Total budget |
| campaignName | String | name of campaign |
| campaignType | Number | Campaign type id |
| creativeIds | String | Comma separated creative Ids |
| creativeType | Number | Creative type id |
| isAgreementChecked | Boolean | agreement check |
| maxBid | Number | max bid |
| startTime | Number | campaign start time |
| timezone | Number | timezone id. |
| bidOptimization `[optional]` | Boolean | Optimize bid price based on analysis. |
| bidPacing `[optional]` | Boolean | Budget is spent equally every hour. |
| impressionCapping `[optional]` | Number | Maximum impressions in one inventory. |
| maxDayClicks `[optional]` | Number | Maximum daily clicks |
| totalClicks `[optional]` | Number | Total clicks |
| maxDayImpressions `[optional]` | Number | Maximum daily impressions |
| totalImpressions `[optional]` | Number | Total impressions |
| maxDayConversions `[optional]` | Number | Maximum daily conversions |
| totalConversions `[optional]` | Number | Total conversions |
| conversionType `[optional]` | String | User conversion type. Allowed values: 'install', 'non-install'. |
| appURL `[optional]` | String | If conversion type is install, specify URL of inventory. |
| targetCPI `[optional]` | Number | Cost per install if conversion type is install. |
| carriers `[optional]` | String | Carrier targeting. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs of targeted carrier(s). |
| networkType `[optional]` | String | Network targeting. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs of targeted network(s). |
| deviceType `[optional]` | String | Device targeting. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs of targeted device type(s). |
| trafficType `[optional]` | String | Traffic type targeting. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs of targeted traffic type(s). |
| manufacturer `[optional]` | String | Manufacturer targeting. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs of targeted manufacturer type(s). |
| os `[optional]` | String | OS targeting. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs of targeted OS. |
| osVersion `[optional]` | String | OS version targeting. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs of targeted OS version based on targeted OS. |
| exchanges `[optional]` | String | Targeted exchanges. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs of exchanges. |
| prebidAudienceSegmentIdList `[optional]` | Array | Prebid Audience Segment Ids to attach campaign to segment Ids. |
| whiteListedDeviceId `[optional]` | String | Target Device Ids. Value in form of String of comma separated device IDs. |
| whiteListedIp `[optional]` | String | IPV4 address. Value in form of String of comma separated IP Address. |
| whiteListedAppId `[optional]` | String | iOS app ID |
| whiteListedPackageName `[optional]` | String | Android package names. Value in form of String of comma separated package names. |
| whiteListedSiteDomain `[optional]` | String | Target sites. Value in form of String of comma separated domain urls. |
| blackListedDeviceId `[optional]` | String | Target Device Ids. Value in form of String of comma separated device IDs. |
| blackListedIp `[optional]` | String | IPV4 address. Value in form of String of comma separated IP Address. |
| blackListedAppId `[optional]` | String | iOS app ID |
| blackListedPackageName `[optional]` | String | Android package names. Value in form of String of comma separated package names. |
| blackListedSiteDomain `[optional]` | String | Target sites. Value in form of String of comma separated domain urls. |
| publisherAdCategory `[optional]` | String | Target Publisher ad category. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| ioId | Number | Target Insertion OrderId in which this campaign belongs. |
| blackListedInventoryGroupIds `[optional]` | String | Target already created Inventory groups. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedInventoryGroupIds `[optional]` | String | Target already created Inventory groups. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedCustomAudienceIds `[optional]` | String | Target already created custom audience Groups. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedCustomAudienceIds `[optional]` | String | Target already created custom audience Groups. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedAudienceSegmentGroupIds `[optional]` | String | Target already created audience segment Groups. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedAudienceSegmentGroupIds `[optional]` | String | Target already created audience segment Groups. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedConversionTagIds `[optional]` | String | Target already created conversion tags. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedConversionTagIds `[optional]` | String | Target already created conversion tags. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| userDealId `[optional]` | String | User specific deal IDs. Value in form of String of comma separated deal IDs. |
| groupDealId `[optional]` | String | Group of selected deals. Value in form of String of comma separated deal IDs. |
| politicalAdvertiserClientId `[optional]` | Number | Id of political advertiser in case of campaign is political campaign. |
| stateIds `[optional]` | String | State Target (It will be considered as White list State Target). Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedStateIds `[optional]` | String | White list State Target . Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedStateIds `[optional]` | String | Black list State Target . Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| countryId | String | Country Target |
| dmaIds `[optional]` `deprecated` | String | DMA Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedDmaIds `[optional]` | String | white list DMA Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedDmaIds `[optional]` | String | black list DMA Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| senateDistrictIds `[optional]` `deprecated` | String | Senate districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedSenateDistrictIds `[optional]` | String | white list senate districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedSenateDistrictIds `[optional]` | String | black list senate districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| congressionalDistrictIds `[optional]` `deprecated` | String | Congressional districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedCongressionalDistrictIds `[optional]` | String | white list congressional districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedCongressionalDistrictIds `[optional]` | String | black list congressional districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| houseDistrictIds `[optional]` `deprecated` | String | House districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedHouseDistrictIds `[optional]` | String | white list house districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedHouseDistrictIds `[optional]` | String | black list house districts Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| geoRadiusDetails `[optional]` `deprecated` | String | To target custom ares in circle or polygon. Value in form of JSON. |
| whiteListedGeoRadiusDetails `[optional]` | String | To white list custom ares in circle or polygon. Value in form of JSON. |
| blackListedGeoRadiusDetails `[optional]` | String | To black list custom ares in circle or polygon. Value in form of JSON. |
| zipcodes `[optional]` `deprecated` | String | ZipCode Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedZipcodes `[optional]` | String | white list zipCode Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedZipcodes `[optional]` | String | black list zipCode Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| locationFileIds `[optional]` | String | Target location by uploading file. Value in form of String of comma separated csv file ids.(pre uploaded) |
| whiteListedLocationIds `[optional]` | String | white list location ids from uploaded files. Value in form of String of comma separated location ids. |
| blackListedLocationIds `[optional]` | String | black list location ids from uploaded files. Value in form of String of comma separated location ids. |
| whiteListedCityIds `[optional]` | String | white list city Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedCityIds `[optional]` | String | black list city Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| whiteListedCountyIds `[optional]` | String | white list county Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| blackListedCountyIds `[optional]` | String | black list county Target. Value in form of String of comma separated IDs. |
| ageRangeIds `[optional]` | String | Target age range. Value in form of string of comma separated IDs. |
| genderIds `[optional]` | String | Target gender. Value in form of String of comma-separated IDs. |
| interestIds `[optional]` | String | Target user interest. Value in form of a string of comma-separated IDs. |
| incomeRangeIds `[optional]` | String | Target user income range. Value in form of a string of comma-separated IDs. |
| languageIds `[optional]` | String | Target user language. Value in form of a string of comma-separated IDs. |
| ethnicityIds `[optional]` | String | Target user ethnicity. Value in form of a string of comma-separated ID. |
| schedule `[optional]` | String\[\]\[\] | key as \[0 to 6\] maps to \[Monday to Sunday\] & values \[\['hh:mm:ss','hh:mm:ss'\], ...\] |
| conversionIds `[optional]` | String | Target pixel conversions. Value in form of a string of comma-separated ID. |
| isAdvanceAudioVideoTargeted | Boolean | To indicate if the advance targeting is enabled if this is true, 'creativeAdvanceTargeting' is optional and it is assumed that every video creative segment is targeted. |
| isBidPacing | Boolean | To indicate whether the bid shading is enabled. |
| creativeAdvanceTargeting | JSON Map: String to Integer | Map of Creative advanced targeting group to list of creative advance targeting segment ids. |
| campaignEstimatorMetaData | JSON | Campaign  Estimator data with `reachMeta`, `landScapeMeta` and `sliderMeta`  |

---

#### Scheduling example

```

    "0": [
      [
        "03:00:00",
        "05:00:00"
      ],
      [
        "06:00:00",
```

patch.description:
This API updates campaign. Whichever fields needs to updated only those needs to be sent in request body.

If campaign is in `DRAFT` mode that this api will automatically update status from `DRAFT` to `PENDING`. In all other cases it will not update status.

---

#### Request Body Detail

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | Integer | campaign id |
| campaignName | String | campaign name |
| advertiserDomain | String | add domain |
| creativeType | Number | Creative type id |
| campaignType | Number | Campaign type id |
| totalBudgetPacing `[optional]` | Boolean | Budget is spent equally every hour. |
| budgetDay | Number | Daily budget for campaign serving daily |
| budgetTotal | Number | Total budget for campaign serving period |
| maxBid | Number | max bid for each bid request |
| timezone | Number | timezone id for campaign |
| startTime | Number | campaign start time |
| endTime | Number | campaign end time |
| status | String | status of campaign |
| creativeIds | Number | camapign creation time update |
| excludeFromPlatformServing | Boolean | exclude campaign from platform serving |
| forTest | Boolean | indicates campaign for test |
| modifiedDate | Timestamp | campign modified date |

| platformMarginJson | String | campaign platform marging json |

| platformMargin | Integer | camapign platform margin number |
| userDealMargin | Integer | camapign user deal margin number |
| bidStrategyFlag | Boolean | bid statergy allowed or not for user |
| bidOptimization `[optional]` | Boolean | Optimize bid price based on analysis. |
| bidPacing `[optional]` | Boolean | Budget is spent equally every hour. |
| impressionCapping `[optional]` | Number | Maximum impressions in one inventory. |
| maxDayClicks `[optional]` | Number | Maximum daily clicks |
| totalClicks `[optional]` | Number | Total clicks |
| maxDayImpressions `[optional]` | Number | Maximum daily impressions |
| totalImpressions `[optional]` | Number | Total impressions |
| maxDayConversions `[optional]` | Number | Maximum daily conversions |
| totalConversions `[optional]` | Number | Total conversions |
| spentScale | Boolean | spent scale on/off |

get.summary: Fetch basic template details list

parameters.name: searchField
parameters.description: Search the result by provided keyword in the searchField.  Search campaign templates by name or id.

parameters.description: The maximum number of returned results per page.

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: Page number for the required data.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(+) sign(ascii value '%2B') and for descending use minus(-) sign. Allowed values - id, name

parameters.name: cmpType
parameters.description: Type of template to filter. Allowed values - 1 (Advanced), 2 (PG). If not provided, templates of all types will be fetched.

get.summary: This API will provide the Values of Campaign Goal AI Objectives and Goals.
get.description: Get a list of Campaign Goal AI objectives and goals. No request body is required (GET). Requires Authorization and X-IAA-OW-ID headers. Uses the logged-in OW ID for context and access control. Response includes objective id, name, displayName, displayOrder, applicableGoals; and goals with id, name, displayName, compatibleCreativeTypes, kpi, minKpi, maxKpi, displayOrder.

get.summary: Conversions basic list
get.description:
## Get list of conversions with basic details(id, name, isROAS).

Get list of all conversions with "isROAS" field in the response object. "isROAS" is boolean and is true for a conversion only if the conversion has either "conversion value" or "financial metric",This also support pagination, and search by id or name. This API is accessible only by an Advertiser.

### SUPPORTED FEATURES: 
* Pagination. 
* Search by name or id.

### HEADER: 


| Key |  Sample Value |
| ---------------- | ----------- |  
| x-iaa-api-token  | hpZucdYn66n9PqYkqqJEikiib1J_zC8xmCvCbYF8LA |


### PARAMS: 


| Key |  Sample Value | Default value |
| ---------------- | ----------- | ----- |

patch.description:
This API endpoint allows authorized users to update the details of an existing creative. The creative's attributes can be modified by advertisers, workspaces, or super users. The creative can be updated with a name, external creative ID, rejection reason, and remarks. Additionally, ownership and edit permissions are validated to ensure the request is authorized. --- #### Request Body Detail | **Field** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | creativeName | String | Represents name of the creative | | externalCreativeId | String | Represents 3rd party id | | creativeRejectionReason | String | Represents reason for rejecting the creative if applicable | | creativeRemarks | String | Represents remarks to be added for this creative | | trackingData | Object | Represents the tracking URLs for video, audio and native video creatives. This can only be updated for video, audio and native video creative types.
Please pass the url key with empty string explicitly in order to remove the value of that url. It is an object having below mentioned fields -
startUrl: String - Represents the start URL for the video
firstQuartileURL: String - Represents the tracking URL for first quartile
midPointURL: String - Represents the tracking URL for mid point
thirdQuartileURL: String - Represents the tracking URL for third quartile
completeURL: String - Represents the tracking URL for complete
impressionURL: String - Represents the tracking URL for impression |

| | is_graph | boolean | request data for graph | | result_type | string | total : total only total rows in response

Default value : 0 | | total_count | number | Total number of records

post.summary: This API provides list of zip codes.
post.description: Get the list of zip codes with state ids for given filters.

requestBody.description:
**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| pageNo `[optional]` | Number | Page number for the required data. The default value is 1. |
| noOfEntries `[optional]` | Number | The maximum number of returned results per page. Default value is 300.|
| sortBy `[optional]` | String | Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(+) sign(ascii value '%2B') and for descending use minus(-) sign. Sorting supported on `id`, `name` fields.|
| searchField `[optional]` | String | Search the result by provided keyword in the searchField. Search zips by `name` or `id`.|
| ids `[optional]` | Array of Integer | selected zip (segmented id) List, zip (segmented id) with provided ids will be returned first compared to other records. |
| parentSegmentIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | Filter a list of zip codes based on their associated state id, where the state is considered the parent of each zip code. The state id should be taken from  [states](?path=/Master%20API/getStatesSegmentDetails) |
| segmentIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | zip list filter by segmented ids. |
| zipCodes `[optional]` | Array of String | zip list filter by zip codes. |

post.summary: This API provides list of states.
post.description: Get a paginated list of state segment based on the provided filters.

requestBody.description:
**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
|
| pageNo `[optional]` | Number | Page number for the required data. The default value is 1. |
| noOfEntries `[optional]` | Number | The maximum number of returned results per page. Default value is 300.|
| sortBy `[optional]` | String | Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(+) sign(ascii value '%2B') and for descending use minus(-) sign. Default value is -id.|
| searchField `[optional]` | String | Search the result by provided keyword in the searchField. search state records by `name` |
| campaignId `[optional]` | Number | State records associated with the provided campaign will be returned first, prioritized over other state records.|
| parentSegmentIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | state list filter by country id. country is parent of state.|
| ids `[optional]` | Array of Integer | selected state id List, states with provided ids will be returned first compared to other records.
| segmentIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | state list filter by state ids.

post.summary: This API provides list of senate districts.
post.description: Get a paginated list of senate districts segment based on the provided filters.

requestBody.description:
**Request Body Details:**

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
|
| pageNo `[optional]` | Number | Page number for the required data. The default value is 1. |
| noOfEntries `[optional]` | Number | The maximum number of returned results per page. Default value is 300.|
| sortBy `[optional]` | String | Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(+) sign(ascii value '%2B') and for descending use minus(-) sign. Default value is -id.|
| searchField `[optional]` | String | Search the result by provided keyword in the searchField. search senate district records by `name` |
| campaignId `[optional]` | Number | Senate district records associated with the provided campaign will be returned first, prioritized over other senate district records.|
| parentSegmentIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | Filter a list of senate district based on their associated state id, where the state is considered the parent of each senate district. The state id should be taken from [states](?path=/Master%20API/getStatesSegmentDetails) |
| ids `[optional]` | Array of Integer | Selected senate district id List, senate district with provided ids will be returned first compared to other records.
| segmentIds `[optional]` | Array of Integer | senate district list filter by senate district ids.

requestBody.description:

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
|

post.summary: Download Report
post.description:
User can download file in three formats.
`xlsx` , `xls` , `csv`

#### Note : request redirects to s3 url. which can download file.

***
#### Request Body Detail 

| ****Field**** | ****Type**** | ****Description****                             | 
|---------------|--------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| data     | object (json)                  | report configuration      |
| fileName | String                           | File Name                 |
| columns  | Array json columns configuration | Column needed in response | 

***
#### columns
| ****Field**** | ****Type**** | ****Description****                             |
|---------------|--------------|-------------------------------------------------|
|value|String|Response key name|
|label|String|UI label to display|

***
#### data
| ****Field**** | ****Type**** | ****Description****                             |
|---------------|--------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| id | String | Unique Report Id | 

***

Default value : 1 | | total_count | number | Number of reports per page.
Default value : 50 | | request_type | string | Report request type.
Allowed value : `daily` , `total` | | user_session_id | string | User specific session id | | sort_by | string | Sort by some fields.
Default value : `date` | | sort_type | string | Order of sorting,
Default Value : `desc`
Allowed value : `asc` , `desc` | | filters | json object | Filters of Object. | | download (Optional) | boolean | For download request
Default value : `false` | ***

sample : [1 - Daily, 2 - Aggregated, 3 - Weekly, 4 - Monthly] | | reportAggregated | String | [Optional] - Field to identify if report dimension is Aggregated or not.
sample : [0- Not aggregated, 1- Aggregated] | | startDate | Long | [Optional] - This should be a long, TIME EPOCH in UNIX format, in milliseconds.
This is report start time.| | endDate | Long | [Optional] - This should be a long, TIME EPOCH in UNIX format, in milliseconds.
This is report end time.| | timezoneId | Integer | [Optional] - Timezone ID| | timezoneName | String | [Optional] - Timezone Name| | sortBy | String | [Optional] - Sort the result set by specific field. For ascending use plus(asc) and for descending use minus(desc) string.
Default value is '+impressions'| | pageNo | Integer | [Optional] - Page number for the required data.
Default value is 1| | noOfEntries | Integer | [Optional] - The maximum number of returned results per page.
Default value is 50|

post.summary: Save report scheduling event.
post.description:
This API saves the report scheduling event. **Request Body Description:** | **Filed** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | reportId | Integer | [Required] - This is report Id, event will be created on this report id. | | subscriberEmails | Array of String | [Required] - List of the emails on which the report will be sent. | | fileType | Integer | [Required] - Report file type id. The report will be sent in the selected file format .
sample : [1 - CSV, 2 - XLS]| | deliveryFrequency | Integer | [Required] - Delivery frequency type id for the emails to be sent.
sample : [1 - ONCE, 2 - DAILY, 3 - WEEKLY, 4 - MONTHLY] | | deliveryDay | String | [Required, if deliveryFrequency is not ONCE] - Delivery day to specify the day-time when the report should be sent.
This is related to Delivery frequency.
WEEKLY DELIVERY DAY: ["SUNDAY", "MONDAY", ...]
MONTHLY DELIVERY DAY: ["FIRST", "LAST", "2", "3", ..., "29"]| | eventEndDate | Long | [Required, if deliveryFrequency is not ONCE] - This should be a long, TIME EPOCH in UNIX format, in milliseconds.
This is events end date, Scheduled report will be stopped after the eventEndDate is exceeded | | runningTotalEnabled | Boolean | [Optional] - Flag to indicate if the 'Total' Running is enabled for the report. This flag is supported only with 'Campaign' dimension.
If this is true the start-date for the report duration should be the EARLIEST campaign start date,
so the report-time-period will be from the Earliest-campaign-start-date to the report-end-date | | earliestCampaignStartDate | Long | [Required with runningTotalEnabled as 'true'] - This should be a long, TIME EPOCH in UNIX format, in milliseconds.
This is campaign's EARLIEST start date from the selected campaigns, which will be set as the start date of the report-time-period. |

data.message: Report schedule has been successfully updated.

post.summary: Send User Invitations
post.description: This API can be used by any customer (organization) to send invitations to one or more users by providing user names and emails detail.

post.summary: Validate Invite
post.description:
When any customer or user is invited then an invitation link with a hash will be sent to provided emails. This hash can be validated by this API.

| **Key** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| invitedToWorkspace | Workspace domain to which customer or user is invited. |
| organizationName | New organization name in case of customer invitation hash & if it is user invitation hash then organization name where the user is invited. |
| workspaceDomain | Workspace domain where user or customer is invited. If the customer is invited by a superuser then the workspace domain will be null as the customer will be creating a new workspace. |
| isExpired | Flag to inform if the invitation is expired. |
| isInviteProcessed | Flag to inform if the invitation is processed. |
| isNewUser | Flag to inform is it is a new user. |
| isIHPCustomer | Flag to inform if it is an IHP customer. |
| isInviteCancelled | Flag to inform if the invite is cancelled. |
| isInviteProcessing | Flag to inform if the invite is in processing status. |

post.summary: Create PLD report template
post.description:
Creates a PLD report template for the given campaigns and scheduling configuration.

The request defines:
- template name
- associated campaignIds
- frequency and frequencyDetails (daily / weekly / monthly / custom)
- template start/end dates
- aggregation flag
- recipient emails
- template status (ACTIVE / INACTIVE)

When the template is ACTIVE, the platform will use the configured schedule
to trigger periodic report generation.

requestBody.description: PLD template definition with all supported scheduling patterns.

ONE_TIME.description: Runs only once at the given startDate.

DAILY.description: Runs every day between startDate and endDate.

WEEKLY.description: Runs every week on the given dayOfWeekId.

MONTHLY_FIRST_DAY.description: Runs on the 1st day of every month.

MONTHLY_LAST_DAY.description: Runs on the last day of every month.

CUSTOM_WEEKS.description: Runs every X weeks on a specific weekday.

CUSTOM_MONTHLY_FIRST_DAY.description: Runs every N months on the 1st day.

CUSTOM_MONTHLY_SPECIFIC_DAY.description: Runs every N months on a specific day.

CUSTOM_MONTHLY_LAST_DAY.description: Runs every N months on the last day.

400.description: Bad request due to missing or invalid inputs

errorObjects.error: startDate must be a positive epoch-millis value

422.description: Rule violation (for example: campaign status not allowed, IO mismatch)

errorObjects.error: All selected campaigns must belong to the same IO

get.summary: Retrieves the latest PLD reports for a specific template ID with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.description: The ID of the PLD template for which to retrieve reports.

parameters.name: searchField
parameters.description: A search string to filter reports.

parameters.name: pageNo
parameters.description: The page number for pagination (default is 1).

parameters.name: noOfEntries
parameters.description: The number of entries per page for pagination (default is 50).

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: The field by which to sort the reports.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the latest PLD reports for the specified template ID.

put.summary: Manage bid modelling attributes for a campaign and dimension
put.description:
This API allows advertisers to manage bid modelling configurations for campaigns, providing full Create, Update, and Delete operations on bid modelling attributes. These attributes control campaign prioritization and spending distribution across various dimensions such as:

**Supported Dimensions**
- Creative
- Location: State, City, Zip Code
- Inventory: Open Exchange, Publisher Category, Deal IDs
- Device: Traffic Type, Device Type
- AdExchange

**Bid model attributes include:**
- Priority: The priority of the bid model.
- Bid Multiplier: The multiplier applied to the base bid.
- Spend Ratio: The ratio of spend allocated to the bid model.
- Spend Ratio Type: The type of spend ratio.

**Bundle support details:**
- Bundles can be created to group entities together for bid modelling.
- Entities can be bundled or unbundled as needed.
- Bundles can be added, updated, or deleted in the bid modelling configuration.
- Bundle's bid modelling attributes are propagated to all entities present in the bundle.

**The API supports the following actions:**
- ADD: Add new bid model entities or bundles.
- DELETE: Remove existing bid model entities or bundles.
- UPDATE: Modify existing bid model entities or bundles.
- INCLUDE/EXCLUDE: Set inclusion or exclusion for entities in the bid modelling configuration.
- Base Bid: Update the base bid for the campaign.

Update specific attributes in bid modell.description: Update specific attributes in bid modelling

Remove existing bid modelling entities -.description: Remove existing bid modelling entities - removes bid model data from bid modelling

Delete bundles from bid modelling - remo.description: Delete bundles from bid modelling - removes bundles from bid modelling and unbundles entities

Update base bid with include/exclude ent.description: Update base bid with include/exclude entities

errorObjects.error: Some provided bundle ids are not valid or not part of the campaign/modelling

Modelling does contain 'other' type of e.description: Modelling does contain 'other' type of entities

errorObjects.error: At least one 'Other' entity is required if there are modelled entities
Must provide valid include or exclude entity IDs

Invalid spend ratios for flexible type.description: Invalid spend ratios for flexible type

errorObjects.error: Total spend ratio must be at least 100 for flexible type
Base bid should not exceed max bid

Bid modifier should be 1 when max bid is.description: Bid modifier should be 1 when max bid is not available

errorObjects.error: Bid modifier should be 1 as max bid is not available.

post.description:
Fetches and returns a detailed metrics report for a specified campaign and dimension,
providing granular insights such as impressions, clicks, eCPM, conversions, and additional breakdowns by the selected dimension.
Supports advanced filtering, sorting, and pagination, and can return either downloadable report URLs or in-depth data tables depending on the request parameters.

This API fetches list of bundles linked to a specific campaign and dimension, along with their entities details and modelling status.
It supports optional filtering by bundle name, bundle ID, and dimension ID

This API retrieves bundle details for a given campaign and dimension.

You can optionally filter results by bundle name or ID using the search field.

get.summary: Retrieves the total count(number of items associate with campaign), dimension-wise id and count of modelled items for a specified campaign
get.description:
This retrieves dimension statistics for a campaign :
Dimension Statistics includes :
     * dimension : Dimension ID (creative, state, city, deal... etc
     * Total count : Total number of entities in a dimension, ex : state : number of status attach to campaign id.
     * Modelled count : Number of entities modelled in a dimension
     * modelledIds : List of modelled entity ids.
Parameters :
         * campaignId : The campaign ID to fetch the total spent for
         * startDate : The start date for the spent
         * endDate : The end date for the spent
Through startDate & endDate we will get total count(target + serve) for campaign.

parameters.name: campaignId
parameters.description: The campaign ID to fetch the dimension statistics

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date(in milliseconds epoch) for the total count

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date(in milliseconds epoch) for the total count

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: List of attributes to be fetched, valid values are : ["totalCount","modelledCount","modelledIds"]

parameters.name: dimensionIds
parameters.description: List of comma separated dimension IDs to fetch statistics for, valid values are : [1 - Creative, 10 - State, 11 - City, 12 - Zip, 3 - Deal, 4 - Open Exchange, 5 - Publisher Category, 13 - Exchange, 7 - Traffic Type, 8 - Device Type]
